UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Janet Thompson.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendants Michael Lane and Tunisia Shackelford are present.
Attorney Marshall Bentley appearing for defendant, Michael Lane, in limited scope.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant, Tunisia Shackleford, in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of October 30, 2017 is vacated. (501)
